description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wardrobe with a modern, rectangular silhouette and a dark gray wood grain finish. The front features three vertical doors, with the central door incorporating a large rectangular mirror panel, while the two flanking doors are solid with subtle panel detailing. Each door is equipped with a small, round knob handle, and the top of the wardrobe has a slightly protruding, framed edge for added visual interest. The sides of the wardrobe are plain, showcasing the same wood grain texture as the front, while the back is a flat, lighter-colored panel, likely for placement against a wall. The wardrobe is designed to store clothing and personal items, with ample internal space implied by its size. Its sturdy construction and neutral color make it suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, dormitories, or shared living spaces.
description: A tall, dark gray wood grain wardrobe with three doors, including a central mirrored panel and round knob handles. Modern and sturdy, it is designed for clothing storage in urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three doors, a central mirror panel, and round knob handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, dark wood grain surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, light-colored panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a plain, dark wood grain surface similar to the left side.
